info.name: Blended Learning Recommendation API - Thesis Project
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the FastAPI backend in the Blended Learning thesis prototype. Base URL defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8000. Run the FastAPI server first: uvicorn api.main:app --reload

request.description: Checks whether the FastAPI backend is running.
Returns the generated OpenAPI schema from FastAPI.
Opens the interactive FastAPI Swagger UI. In Postman this returns HTML.
Opens the FastAPI ReDoc documentation page. In Postman this returns HTML.
Returns stored student recommendation records for the Student Records page.
Returns total students, number of segments, and segment distribution.
Returns recently added recommendation records.
Looks up one stored student recommendation by student_id. Change collection variable student_id to an existing ID.

exec: pm.test('Student ID exists in response', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('student_id'); });

item.name: Get Last Generated Student by ID

request.description: Run a Generate Recommendation request first. This request uses the saved last_student_id collection variable.

exec: pm.test('Returned the last generated student', function () { pm.expect(json.student_id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('last_student_id')); });

request.description: Negative test: checks the API returns 404 when a student ID is not found.

body.raw:

    "benefit_self_directed": 5
  },
  "strengths_positive_aspects": "I like the flexibility of blended learning, recorded lectures, quizzes, and online materials because they help me study at my own pace.",
  "challenges_suggestions": "Sometimes I still need clearer instructions and more interaction in online discussions. More feedback and structured weekly tasks would help."
}

request.description: Creates a new demo student, assigns a K-Modes cluster, extracts tags from open-ended answers, generates a recommendation report, and saves the result. The student_id uses Postman's {{$timestamp}} dynamic variable to avoid duplicates.

request.description: Negative test: after running any successful Generate Recommendation request, this should return 409 because the student_id already exists.
Negative test: only one of the 33 required features is provided, so the backend should return 400.

exec: pm.test('Error detail mentions missing features', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().detail).to.include('Missing'); });

request.description: Negative test: the current backend does not explicitly catch non-numeric conversion errors, so it may return 500. If you later add Pydantic validation, change this expected status to 422 or 400.

exec: pm.test('Status code indicates validation/server rejection', function () { pm.expect([400,422,500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Creates one demo record and stores the new ID as last_student_id.
Uses last_student_id saved from step 3.
The newly created record should appear near the top.
Dashboard count should increase after creation.
